creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
www/node18 fails to stage on 15-CURRENT, both under poudriere and when built using ports method.

The relevant error is:

===>  Staging for node18-18.18.0
===>   node18-18.18.0 depends on package: ca_root_nss>=0 - found
===>   Generating temporary packing list
gmake[2]: Entering directory '/export/wrkdir/amd64/export/freebsd/git/ports/www/node18/work/node-v18.18.0'
gmake -C out BUILDTYPE=Release V=0
/export/wrkdir/amd64/export/freebsd/git/ports/www/node18/work/node-v18.18.0/out/Release/.deps//export/wrkdir/amd64/export/freebsd/git/ports/www/node18/work/node-v18.18.0/out/Release/obj.target/cctest/src/node_snapshot_stub.o.d:39: *** target file '/export/wrkdir/amd64/export/freebsd/git/ports/www/node18/work/node-v18.18.0/out/Release/obj.target/cctest/src/node_snapshot_stub.o' has both : and :: entries.  Stop.
gmake[2]: *** [Makefile:134: node] Error 2
gmake[2]: Leaving directory '/export/wrkdir/amd64/export/freebsd/git/ports/www/node18/work/node-v18.18.0'
*** Error code 2

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /export/freebsd/git/ports/www/node18
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /export/freebsd/git/ports/www/node18
bob$
